notificationName.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

devices.description: List of devices this notification is sent to. (default is all devices). Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

input.description: Value that is passed as input to the notification action

text.description: Text that is used instead of the one defined in the app

title.description: Title that is used instead of the one defined in the app
